name: adip
description: ADIP — Dealer Intelligence OS. Root scripts for local development.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix apps/local-api install && npm --prefix apps/web install && node scripts/local-env.mjs
scripts.setup:agent: python -m uv venv apps/api/.venv && python -m uv pip install --python apps/api/.venv -r apps/api/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: node scripts/local-env.mjs && concurrently --restart-tries 20 --restart-after 1500 -n shim,web,agent -c magenta,cyan,green "npm --prefix apps/local-api start" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev" "npm run dev:agent"
